title: Doflamingo Reveals His Cruelty
description: Pages 9–13 focus on doflamingo reveals his cruelty, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kyros, Unknown person #5 as law and Luffy push into the palace confrontation, forcing Doflamingo to face the consequences of Corazon's death.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: There is one executive guarding the smile factory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The free- swimming human: Senior Pink!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: On the stone statue of Pica, there is...

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: In the sunflower fields on level four,

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: The Colosseum's Hero, the Flag Human, Diamante!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: On the top floor of the palace,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The current King of Dressrosa, the thread human, Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: And his staff, the mucus* human trebol!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: On level three, the leader of the underlings, the puncture human, Gladius!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On level two, there are four:

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: LAO G, OF THE EARTH SAGE FIST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And the half-fishman of fighting fish descent, bellinger!

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: The full- body weapon human: Baby 5!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And the super weight human, much wise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There are around 10 others as well...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The fighters in the majority of the ongoing battles are barely standing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: On top of the stone statues of Pica

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Your attacks are putting me to sleep over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Level three of the Royal Palace Plateau

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Quickly, get to a safe place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I doubt there are any anymore, though...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yet, if we cannot take down dofla- mingo,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Our Fates within this bird cage will not change!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You mean to tell us to entrust the fate of this country to pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Are you trying to imply that that fate brought you here as well?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: What type of bullshit did Corazon drill into that head of yours!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You actually believe you can stop me!? That "natural enemy" skill is all just supersli- lion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: You're within the D power's sphere of influence!

summary: Doflamingo Reveals His Cruelty advances the Dressrosa story through Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
